assertions.evidence: Fixture LeadDrawer for pre-seeded Converted lead shows 'Convert to Case'. DOM check confirms fixture status is Converted and Convert-to-Case control is present in that state.

Convert-to-Case modal opened from fixture and was prefilled from lead data. DOM checks all true for client name, loss address, peril type, insurer, phone/email, estimated loss, and fixture notes text.

Submitted Create Case from fixture modal, auto-navigated to /cases, and verified created case appears with lead-derived values (Rodriguez, Maria; 7421 SW 82nd Ave, Miami, FL 33143; Hurricane/Wind; Citizens Property Insurance). DOM evidence captured file number CRA-MNF35ZYB.

commands.command: agent-browser --session conversion-rerun open http://localhost:5173/fixtures/convert-case && wait --load networkidle && snapshot -i -C
commands.observation: Fixture route loaded with Converted lead drawer and open Convert-to-Case modal.

commands.command: agent-browser --session conversion-rerun screenshot ...VAL-EXPAND-004... --annotate/--full + eval DOM checks
commands.observation: Captured Convert-to-Case visibility evidence and Converted-state DOM evidence.

commands.command: agent-browser --session conversion-rerun screenshot ...VAL-EXPAND-005... --annotate + eval prefill checks
commands.observation: Captured modal prefill evidence; all required prefill assertions evaluated true.

commands.command: agent-browser --session conversion-rerun find role button click --name 'Create Case' && wait --url **/cases
commands.observation: Conversion submit completed and navigated to Cases view.

commands.command: agent-browser --session conversion-rerun screenshot ...VAL-CROSS-005... + get text body + eval case DOM checks
commands.observation: Created case present in /cases with expected lead-derived values.
errors output was empty; console log contained known local-dev warnings/404 resource errors and Supabase schema-cache warnings.

consoleState.details: agent-browser errors output empty, but console-log contains known pre-existing local warnings/errors (404 resource fetches and Supabase schema-cache warnings).
